title: Why Greenidge Generation Holdings (GREE) Is the Most Undervalued Bitcoin Mining Stock
text: Investment Analysis: Greenidge Generation Holdings (GREE). Why GREE Is Considered Undervalued: GREE ranks first among undervalued bitcoin mining stocks with analysts projecting 391.04% upside over the next 12 months. Growth Trajectory: The company plans significant capacity expansion adding 2.5MW in Q2 2025 and 25MW by Q4 2025 potentially reaching 146.5MW total mining capacity by year-end. Earnings Analysis Recent Performance: Q4 2024 total revenues reached $14.8 million up $2.4 million from Q3 2024. The company holds over 85 bitcoin as of Q1 2025. Reduced debt by $5.2 million through privately negotiated debt-for-equity exchanges. Operational Efficiency: The company reduced its SG&A expenses by almost $9 million throughout 2024 demonstrating improved cost management. Current Capacity: GREE operates 119MW of active self-mining hosting and power generation across facilities in New York Mississippi and North Dakota. Hedge Fund Interest: Only 3 hedge funds currently hold positions in GREE suggesting limited institutional adoption despite strong analyst projections.
